name: EquiDock
description: Quick rigid body protein-protein docking given two protein pdb files. Approximates the binding pockets and predicts the docking poses using keypoint matching and alignment.
capabilities: Quick rigid body protein-protein docking given two protein pdb files
Approximates the binding pockets and predicts the docking poses using keypoint matching and alignment

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

ligand_protein.description: Ligand protein structure in PDB format to be docked onto the receptor
